subsections.lyrics:
You sit here next to me, don't you think we're quiet all the time
How come we don't open up, and talk about our minds
At least now we can be, you and me
But when you're eyes turn up beyond your hair, I'm dreaming away and

You whisper quietly while holding my hand
Strongly in love for the phase
All day I stay near you to hear what you'd say
Wishing to know of your thoughts

Now we're sitting by the window, and you're reaching for your neck
I know its now the time to tell you, but I, I just can't think fast enough
Don't you get my feelings there is, no surprise
But as I'm breathing words with hollow air, I'm dreaming away and

You whisper quietly, you whisper silently, you don't need no sound
You whisper quietly, you whisper silently, you don't need no sound
'I need your lips'
You whisper quietly
'I can't live like this'
You whisper silently
'I need your lips on mine'
You don't need no sound

You whisper quietly while holding my hand
Strongly in love for the phase
All day I stay near you to hear what you'd say
Wishing to know of your thoughts
